title: mariscus soyauxii subsp. pallescens
intro: Mariscus soyauxii subsp. pallescens, also known as the pallescent Mariscus, is a type of sedge plant native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Mariscus soyauxii subsp. pallescens are attributed to its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which make it useful in treating various infections and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. In herbal preparations, Mariscus soyauxii subsp. pallescens is typically used to make infusions, decoctions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
